# ModelPerformance

> Model quality and cost metrics per prompt category

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| model | string | yes | - | Model name |
| provider | openai \| anthropic \| google \| mistral \| cohere \| local \| other | yes | - | LLM provider |
| promptCategory | string | yes | - | Prompt category |
| callCount | integer | yes | 0 | Number of calls sampled |
| avgCostUsd | float | yes | - | Average cost per call |
| avgDurationMs | float | yes | - | Average response time |
| avgTokens | float | yes | - | Average tokens per call |
| qualityScore | float | yes | - | Quality score 0-1 (from evaluations) |
| errorRate | float | yes | 0 | Percentage of calls that errored |
| p50DurationMs | integer | yes | - | Median response time |
| p99DurationMs | integer | yes | - | 99th percentile response time |
| lastUpdatedAt | string | yes | - | When metrics were last recalculated |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Queries

- `leaderboard`: `SELECT model, provider, promptCategory, avgCostUsd, qualityScore,
       (qualityScore / NULLIF(avgCostUsd, 0)) as value_ratio
FROM model_performance
WHERE promptCategory = $category
ORDER BY value_ratio DESC`

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/model-performance` — List all
- `POST /api/model-performance` — Create
- `GET /api/model-performance/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/model-performance/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/model-performance/:id` — Delete
